Chrome Extension · 100% Free

See your whole day
in the side panel
at a glance

Syncs with Google Calendar to show today’s schedule
as a timeline while you work.
Never miss an important event again.

Add from Chrome Web Store See features →
Free to use
Google Calendar sync
MV3 latest manifest
Wed, 01/15/2025
9 AM
Team Meeting 9:00 AM - 10:00 AM
10 AM
Code Review 10:30 AM - 11:00 AM
1:20 PM

1on1 Meeting 2:00 PM - 2:45 PM

Weekly Retro 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM
Features

Simple, yet powerful

Everything you need, in a single side panel

Google Calendar Integration

Seamlessly sync multiple calendars. Group them together and switch between work and personal with one click.

Timeline View

Visualize your schedule along a time axis. Overlapping events are arranged automatically so you can grasp your day at a glance.

Current Time Line

A red line always marks the current time, so you can intuitively track your progress through the day.

Local Events

Manage your own events without a Google account. Recurring events are supported too.

Reminder Notifications

Get notified before important events. Reliable alerts at the timing you choose, so nothing slips through the cracks.

Customizable

Adjust display settings, color schemes, and working hours to your liking. Includes color-blind-friendly presets and English/Japanese support.

Memo Panel

A collapsible memo area at the bottom of the panel. Resize it freely — your notes are saved automatically.

Screenshots

See it in action

Install

Get started in a minute

Three steps to get the side panel up and running

1

Open the Web Store

Click the button below to visit the Chrome Web Store page.

→
2

Click “Add to Chrome”

Click the “Add to Chrome” button at the top right of the page.

→
3

Open the side panel

Click the toolbar icon and start using it right away.

Install from Chrome Web Store
